programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Justin Herbert's immaculate fourth quarter touchdown toss to Keenan Allen keeps the Bolts undefeated on the season as they take down Bo Nix and the Broncos, 23-20.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Seattle Seahawks quarterback Sam Darnold threw for 244 yards and 2 touchdowns, and the Seahawks beat the Tennessee Titans 30-24 Sunday for their fifth win in six games.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: New England Patriots quarterback Drake Maye guided New England to a pair of fourth-quarter touchdowns, rallying his team from an 11-point deficit to a 28-24 victory over Baltimore on Sunday night.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford passed for 368 yards and hit Colby Parkinson for 2 touchdowns, and the NFC-leading Rams became the first team to clinch a postseason berth with a 41-34 victory over the Detroit Lions.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Buffalo Bills rally from a 21-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots 35-31, to stay alive in the AFC East's playoff race.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Put your knowledge to the test with 40 questions about NFL history!

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: A 44-year-old Philip Rivers makes his return to the lineup following a five-year absence as the Colts take the Seahawks down to the wire with Jason Myers' six field goals breaking a franchise record for Seattle.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Eddy Piñeiro hit a 41-yard field goal in overtime before San Francisco stopped Kyren Williams on fourth down with 3:36 to play, and the short-handed 49ers hung on for a thrilling 26-23 victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baltimore's defense came up with three turnovers, Tyler Loop connected on four field goals as Ravens extend their winning streak to three with 27-19 win over Minnesota.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Patrick Mahomes threw for 257 yards and 3 touchdowns, scrambled for another, and led the Chiefs to a 30-17 victory.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you hit more greens and make more powerful contact with the irons by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Mexico
programme.desc: Contestants get acquainted with their teammates while a series of difficult decisions has an immediate impact on the competition. The glass breaking challenge provides an early test of grit and determination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Teams face off in Blackjack as tensions begin to rise and a player's confidence begins to dwindle.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Chemistry within teams begin to crack as they are forced to conquer the Flop Wall.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Players face a major twist which changes the course of the competition.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A team is forced to overcome the odds of being severely outnumbered.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as teams merge and the focus on individuals is magnified.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Some unfinished business is settled, leaving one player fighting for survival.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A crucial decision at the start of the semifinal matches impact who will compete in the championship match.

programme.title: The Big Break

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal demonstrate Dave Pelz's tip to stop hitting the ground before the ball and a shot around the green used by Open champions.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach pitching tips from some of golf's greatest champions. Learn how to set up for solid contact like Tiger Woods, hit the flop shot like Raymond Floyd, and spin wedges like Paul Runyan.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal lean on golf's greatest players to cure the biggest backswing faults. Stop excessive leg action like Jack Nicklaus, reduce upper body sway like Arnold Palmer, and improve poor swing plane like Seve Ballesteros.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: PGA Coach Adam Schriber reveals how he trains his pro golfers in the off-season. Adam demonstrates golf-specific workouts to add distance and flexibility and explains how to make positive swing adjustments without going outside.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Featuring lessons with George Gankas and NCAA Champion Matthew Wolff, Xander Schauffele and his swing coach/father Stefan, David Leadbetter, Mike Adams, Brad Faxon, and Bill Harmon.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: No one wants to deal with the dreaded hosel rocket, so let Devan Bonebrake help you put a stop to your shanks for good!

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan has drills, feels and exercises that will help you use your arms better and improve your golf swing!

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake explains how the finish affects other parts of the swing and why you should put a priority on improving it.

programme.title: The Golf Fix

programme.desc: Golf instructor Michael Breed answers viewers' e-mail questions.

programme.title: The Next Shot
